metadata.title: Pacifica Ensenada – Oceanfront Condos for Sale in Ensenada, Baja California
metadata.description: Pacifica is a premier oceanfront condominium development in Ensenada, Baja California. Wake up to Pacific Ocean views and enjoy resort-style amenities steps from the sea.

hero.headline: Live the extraordinary
hero.subheadline: Invest in the tourist corridor of Baja California — the development with the highest appreciation, where every day is a space to enjoy with your family.

explore.heading: Explore the development
explore.selectPrompt: Select a lot to see details

dreamsStart.body: Acquire your lot and choose one of our ready-to-build models. Whether a condo or residential lots in Villas y Privadas — Pacífica is the place to live and grow with guaranteed appreciation.

ctaBanner.text: We certify so you can build your future
